data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Cost allocation per department', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The absence of any checks or confirmations related to cost allocation indicates a clear gap in the coverage of this requirement as outlined in the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of cost allocation functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the cost allocation requirement.
